title: PSEnvironmentScanner opens modal ShowDialog blocking parent Scan Dashboard form
description: When the Scan Dashboard Run button invokes Invoke-PSEnvironmentScanner.ps1 via '& $scriptPath', the scanner script calls Build-ScannerGUI followed by $form.ShowDialog(). ShowDialog() is modal and blocks the calling thread, which means the Scan Dashboard form becomes unresponsive until the scanner window is closed. This is a design sin — the scanner should either be launched in a new process or use Show() with proper cleanup.
detection_method: Code review of scan script invocation path from dashboard

attempts.notes: No automated fix. Remedy instructions: No remedy defined
Known fix available (FIX-202604050440-1713: Auto-detected resolution of unknown at C:\PowerShellGUI\scripts\QUICK-APP\FOLDER-ROOT\Install-ModulesList.ps1:?). Manual application required.
